song.title: We Love the Church Life
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G C G Some these days would tell us that our Jesus is not food. .C G A7 D7 That we only need to know about Him and do good. .G C G But we’re glad to tell you brothers, it’s just not that way -- .C G A7 D7 G Jesus is the bread of life; we eat Him every day.
[C] .G G7 C G We love the church life, eating, drinking, breathing Jesus. . Em A7 D We love the church life, taking in God’s Word. .G G7 C G We love to hear those “O Lord, Amen, Hallelujahs!” . Em A7 D7 G We love the church life, feasting with the Lord.
[V2] When He fills our inward parts, we’re never quite the same. So much richness we can taste by calling on His name. Services but once a week for us will never do. Everyday we need the fellowship to take us through.
[V3] If these latter days and situations of the world Make you feel that 'round a vicious circle you are swirled, Then please listen closely to the things we have to say. It may be that you will find with us a better way.
